title: Inner Ring Inscription
description: A reference-dependent ring series: one platinum band establishes the exact inner-wall engraving zone, then three variants preserve the same inscription placement across material, lighting, and retail contexts.
creative_direction: This package isolates identity consistency and text placement. Image 01 establishes the ring geometry and the tiny inner inscription; images 02-04 depend on it as the primary reference while changing material, scene, and commercial presentation.

generation_plan.ref_strategy: Run 01 first. Use its runtime result URL as --ref for 02-04. Queue may run 02-04 concurrently after 01 is done.
generation_plan.index_policy: Only status=done images with image.png are included in works/index.json.

en.title: Inner Ring Inscription
en.description: A reference-dependent ring series preserving the same tiny inner-wall inscription across material, lighting, and retail variants.

zh-CN.title: 戒指内壁微刻系列
zh-CN.description: 一组依赖参考图的戒指系列，在材质、光线和零售场景变化中保持同一处内壁微刻文字。
